title: Nvidia donated a GB300 supercomputer to the Navy, to teach officers AI’s limits
summary: It is “whether future military leaders understand them well enough to evaluate their limitations, apply them ethically and employ them responsibly.” The supercomputer builds on a research pact between Nvidia and the school struck in December 2024.
